message:
Add CLI filtering by network, chat, and date range

New --network, --chat, --since, and --until options for both backfill
and watch modes. SyncEngine applies the filter to skip non-matching
chats and messages. Backfill stops paginating backward once past the
since cutoff.

Also fixes pre-existing ConfigTests.testDefaultValues assertion to
match the actual Dropbox-based default log directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
